close_reason: Chose Rust for consistency with rustdeps-gen
description:
Decide between:
1. Python - natural for parsing pyproject.toml, has packaging/pip libraries
2. Rust - consistent with rustdeps-gen, good TOML support, fast
3. Go - consistent with godeps-gen

Considerations:
- Python has 'packaging' library for version parsing
- Python has 'tomllib' (stdlib 3.11+) for TOML
- Rust has good TOML crates
- Need to wrap with nix tools regardless of language
title: Choose implementation language for pydeps-gen
